_comment: RESILIENCY TEST: null value for required 'query' field. Schema marks query as required and type: string. Sending null should return 422 — NOT 500 (which would mean the null propagated into the LLM call). A common real-world bug: client sends null when they mean to omit, and server crashes trying to call .strip() or len() on None.

detail.msg: none is not an allowed value
